cards.rules_text:
This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands in your realm. [i](Your realm consists of up to one land of each of the basic land types.)[/i]
Whenever this creature attacks, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped with a stun counter on it, then shuffle.

When A Promise enters, if you cast it and you don't control another permanent named A Promise, prevent all damage that would be dealt to you until your next turn, then put a wish counter on each creature you control.
{2}, Remove a wish counter from a creature you control: It gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each of its colors. Draw a card.

Flash
When this enchantment enters, up to one target creature or enchantment you control becomes a 4/4 blue and green Turtle creature until end of turn.
Materialize 2 [i](Tap one or more other enchantments you control with total mana value 2 or more: This also becomes an Icon creature until your next turn.)[/i]

Emerge {5}{B}{G} [i](You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.)[/i]
Flying, lifelink, vigilance
When Ajha enters, return any number of target creature cards with total mana value 5 or less that weren't put there this turn from your graveyard to the battlefield under your control.

{1}, Sacrifice this creature: Draft a card from your sanctum. [i](Look at three random cards from your sanctum. Put one into your hand.)[/i]
{4}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draft a card from your sanctum.

Flash

I — You may mill five cards.

You may cast Erysite spells from outside the game for their transcend cost. [i](Even if you already have or it's not your chosen Erysite.)[/i]
Whenever you cast a transcended Erysite spell, draw two cards.
